name: Beetle Breeding Pit
description: Studying captured beetles reveals how they brood. Unlocks the Breeding Pit.

name: Hardened Guards
description: Surviving a raid teaches the warren to fight. Guards hit 50% harder.

name: Worm Shrine
description: The forge-song echoes deep. Something vast stirs below. Unlocks the Worm Shrine.

name: Preservation Techniques
description: Surviving a famine teaches careful storage. Farms hold 50% more.

name: Hobgoblin Brood
description: The forges run hot enough to raise a heavier breed. The Breeding Pit can raise Hobgoblins — twice the work for a heavier appetite.

name: Goblin Overseer
description: A living beacon: the Breeding Pit can raise an Overseer that drives every worker around it to labour faster.
